description: Internal dropdown component for {{token}} variable selection in rich text editors. Displays token keys, descriptions, and optional category grouping with sticky section headers. Supports keyboard navigation, query-based filtering, and an optional "Create new token" action at the bottom.

examples.title: Used internally by rich editors
examples.code: <TokenAutocomplete IsVisible="true" Tokens="@tokens" Query="@query" HighlightedIndex="0" SupportsCreation="true" OnTokenSelected="HandleSelected" OnCreateRequested="HandleCreate" OnHighlightedIndexChanged="HandleIndexChanged" />
